Compliance.description: No major fines/bans. Subject to CompCom scrutiny (2023: lower fees ordered, pledged R200m investment). Operational in competitive market; driver protests but no shutdowns.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 1.5/10 (1,511 reviews), overwhelmingly negative on delivery/no-shows/refunds. App ratings high globally but SA-specific complaints align.

Product Value.description: Wide range but high markups (20-45% vs in-store), fees erode value; convenience premium.

Innovation.description: Real-time tracking, Uber One sub, grocery/dark stores, SPAR partnership (275+ stores), safety tech (hour limits, emergency).

Customer Support.description: App chat/Help center primary; reviews cite unresponsive, no phone for customers, poor resolution.

Accessibility & Security.description: App accessible on iOS/Android; no specific inclusivity issues found. No recent SA data breaches or POPIA violations reported. Global safety features like emergency button implemented.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Delivery R20+, 20-45% menu markup, Uber One R50/mo (R0 deliv >R100)

socialSentiment.summary: Strongly negative on HelloPeter/Google (delivery/refund fails); app ratings contradict but review themes poor.
